purpose: Single source reminder for adding/updating news, announcements, statements and downloadable documents on the static MTEF site.
goldenRule: Never update only one page. A content change must propagate to content/news.json, the article page, homepage cards, news list, sitemap, schema and document assets where relevant.

newsOrAnnouncement.idRule: Use a stable lowercase kebab-case slug. It should match the URL final segment.
newsOrAnnouncement.orderingRule: content/news.json is sorted by date descending by scripts/generate-news.mjs; newest must appear first on homepage and /hirek.

articlePage.copyFromExisting: For a new announcement, copy the nearest existing page under kozlemenyek/ and update every title/date/URL/schema/body/download reference.

document.fileNameRule: Use lowercase kebab-case, include year/date/topic if useful; avoid spaces and accents.
document.verification: asset-guard.py must verify documents exist in source and Vercel output.

filesToEditForNewItem.action: Add a new object with all required metadata and document links. Keep valid JSON.
Create full static article/announcement page with SEO and schema.
Copy PDF/DOCX/downloadables here if the item has attachments.
Usually no edit. It regenerates homepage cards, /hirek list and sitemap NEWS_SITEMAP block from content/news.json. Edit only if card/list template changes.
Run generator to update <!-- NEWS_CARDS_START --> block. Also manually update top-level homepage JSON-LD itemList/schema if the new item should be represented there.
Run generator to update <!-- NEWS_LIST_START --> block. Verify newest item is first.
Run generator to update <!-- NEWS_SITEMAP_START --> block. Verify article and document URLs are included.
Add durable/critical documents or new stable route to routes/criticalAssets when relevant.

preDeployChecklist: New/changed item exists in content/news.json with correct date/title/excerpt/url.
Dedicated article page exists at kozlemenyek/<id>/index.html.
Article page canonical and JSON-LD use https://mtef.hu/<path>.
All PDF/DOCX links point to /assets/documents/... and files exist.
Homepage news cards regenerated and newest relevant item appears first.
/hirek list regenerated and newest item appears first.
sitemap.xml includes article and document URLs.
site-database.json/SITE-DATABASE.md updated when new stable route or durable document is added.
postDeployLiveChecks: https://mtef.hu/ contains new item title if it should appear on homepage.
https://mtef.hu/hirek contains new item title and correct ordering.
https://mtef.hu/kozlemenyek/<id> returns 200 and shows full content.
Each document URL returns 200 with expected content-type.
All visible logos and hero assets still return 200.

knownManualHotspots.note: scripts/generate-news.mjs updates the visible NEWS_CARDS block, but top-level structured data near the head may still need manual update for newest/high-value news.
Article body is manual static HTML today; no generator creates full article pages yet.
This is the site memory; keep it synchronized when new content becomes durable.
